infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PROVENANCE uses the camera to capture and cryptographically sign photos at the moment of capture.

plugins.cameraPermission: PROVENANCE uses the camera to capture and cryptographically sign photos at the moment of capture.

plugins.photosPermission: PROVENANCE reads the exact original file of a photo you select, so verification checks the real bytes instead of a re-compressed copy.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: PROVENANCE saves captured photos to your library so you can verify them later.
